posts.text:
On the show today:

Are you suffering from loss of sleep, ideological bloat, and brain cramps over the war in Iran? You may have Iran Propaganda Syndrome…

and you may have caught it from your favorite podcaster or Democratic politician. We’ll break it all down.

Watch here: piped.video/watch?v=c5FXdkFo…
